rows.label: qev075304_MSG0001
rows.name:
Tch! I lost. It's amazing... You
get stronger at a speed many times
faster than I progress...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075304_JNK0010
rows.name: Modesty

rows.label: qev075304_SEL0011
rows.name:
Acknowledge Zang's ability,
saying he was strong too.

rows.label: qev075304_JNK0020
rows.name: Provoke

rows.label: qev075304_SEL0021
rows.name: Boast of your victory and taunt Zang.

rows.label: qev075304_MSG0002
rows.name:
It doesn't feel bad to hear you say
that, but... It's still not enough.
This won't work against them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075304_MSG0003
rows.name:
Well, when I keep losing this many
times, I can't exactly talk back![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075304_MSG0004
rows.name:
...How was that, Tolba? I'm not
that big of a deal, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075304_MSG0005
rows.name:
N-No way...! I was deeply
moved watching you two fight![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075304_MSG0006
rows.name:
...Yeah! With this, I will... give up... I
realized that a weak guy like me doesn't have
the right to join the ranks of you masters.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075304_MSG0007
rows.name: Master... and [ST:playername] too, thank you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075304_JNK0030
rows.name: Suggest

rows.label: qev075304_SEL0031
rows.name:
Advise Tolba that he should
become strong in his own way.

rows.label: qev075304_JNK0040
rows.name: Advise

rows.label: qev075304_SEL0041
rows.name:
Tell Zang to take Tolba
as an apprentice.

rows.label: qev075304_MSG0009
rows.name:
I know... I'd feel bad
abandoning someone who carries
the same feelings as me too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075304_MSG0010
rows.name:
...Listen, it's still impossible
right now, but once I become strong
enough to teach things to others...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075304_MSG0011
rows.name:
And if Tolba has become a warrior with
more guts, how should I say it... then[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075304_MSG0012
rows.name:
...I wouldn't mind making you
my apprentice. So you do your
best with your training too![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075304_MSG0013
rows.name: Eh... Does that mean![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075304_MSG0014
rows.name:
Just hurry up and go home to train! If
you slack off even a little bit, I
absolutely won't take you as my apprentice![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075304_MSG0015
rows.name:
Y-Yes! Starting today, I'll do
push-ups every day! Swing my katana!
And become strong like Master![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075304_MSG0016
rows.name: Hehe, Tolba looked really happy.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075304_MSG0017
rows.name:
I remembered a buddy of mine
who looked a lot like him...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075304_MSG0018
rows.name:
He had a huge body but was timid. I taught
him martial arts for a long time, but
honestly, he didn't have much talent...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075304_MSG0019
rows.name:
But no matter how strict the
training got, he never ran away
or whined. He really had guts.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075304_MSG0020
rows.name:
...You ask what happened to
that buddy? He died... in the
battle with the Growth...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075304_MSG0021
rows.name:
But I heard my buddy fought bravely
right up to his final moments. He
died proudly as a Lars warrior.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075304_MSG0022
rows.name: Maybe I can project onto Tolba...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075304_MSG0023
rows.name: G-Gwaaaaaaah!!!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075304_MSG0024
rows.name:
Wh-What was that!? That voice
just now... was it Tolba!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075304_MSG0025
rows.name:
Is that... a Hastara Grage!?
Don't tell me he got attacked...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075304_MSG0026
rows.name:
[ST:playername]! I'm going after it.
It took Tolba away![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev075304_MSG0027
rows.name: Damn it... Don't die, Tolba!![ST:wait ]
